title: Gentle Brew
description: An almost-peaceful modpack: Trade with every mob, collect every painting, fish for new items in different biomes and brew tasty drinks
body:
![Make tea, not war  Gentle Brew makes combat unnecessary so you can focus  on exploration and building. Monsters are neutral instead  of hostile, and killing won't yield any drops or experience.  Instead, you can offer treats to creatures and monsters  to receive gifts from them, and experience can be gained  from brewing and farming.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1be9176a3b34553f056cf19a7aa37a407224b98.jpeg)

![Hold Ctrl while looking at a mob through a spyglass to see what gifts it prefers.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d3b606f0212e8103e1eee87409ee63cdf4b63eb.jpeg)

![More to explore  Archaeology has been expanded, wandering traders  have new wares, fishing yields biome-specific loot and  cobble generators create more stone types. Brewing and  enchanting can be accessed earlier in the game, with new  brewing recipes and more control over enchantments.  Paintings are locked to their specific variants and can be  collected all over the world from fishing, trading and more.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb7d37001ed5a362db6380cdd199ad8d935c846e.jpeg)

![Use the field guide to keep track of the paintings you've collected and see hints on where to find them.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/739ccd2578c26b61db9c9308080493ab000d3ae5.jpeg)

![No villagers, no End  A few enchantments, mobs and the End have been removed to cultivate a more relaxing vibe and make room for new kinds of progression. Gentle Brew avoids adding new registries as much as possible, meaning no new modded blocks or items. Instead, items have been repurposed with new looks, names, uses and mechanics. Custom info tabs, tooltips and advancements guide the way.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a877c044e615293a208d48256bd0f80d0d50bf14.jpeg)

![Wandering traders offer valuable items in exchange for a good meal. They are a source of several unique paintings. Send them away if you don't want to trade.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2599a50a513db908da8bfedfa5b62c1c75ba4f9d.jpeg)

Many of the ideas in this pack were inspired by the phenomenal Raspberry Flavoured modpack. Thank you to raspmary and the rest of the RF team. Extra thanks to [Cassian](https://modrinth.com/user/Cassian) for adding mod functionality that benefitted both RF and this pack, and to [Noelle](https://modrinth.com/user/noelledotjpg) for contributing logo and title art, and to [asof](https://modrinth.com/user/asof) for many technical and artistic contributions. <3

Early versions of this pack include Antique Atlas 4, using a custom fork by by cassiancc and distributed according to its LGPL license. 

### Special thanks to the authors of the many resource packs included

- 2DWisp: [Artisinal Default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/artisanal-default), [Artisinal Nether Bricks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/artisanal-nether-bricks), [Raven Phantoms](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/raven-phantoms), [Simple Grass Flowers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers), [Simple Lower Grass Sides](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-lower-grass-sides), [Simple Rustic Glass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-rustic-glass)
